summary: Clear, well‑captured Phil Lesh bass tones shine in this recording, though overall show details are unclear.
review: The lone review focuses on Phil Lesh’s astonishing tone, describing his melodic six‑string bass as crystal‑clear and audible even in a large arena. No comments are made about the rest of the performance or the source of the recording, leaving the broader show quality undefined.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is available and it praises Phil Lesh’s tone while providing no information on overall performance or recording source, leading to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes clear, perfect bass note articulation and audible pick slides, suggesting a clean capture of the low end despite no explicit source information.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.

band_member_comments.Phil: Praised as having an amazing, clear tone that shines throughout the performance.
